Home / Services / Interior Painting

Interior Painting

Transform your living space with our expert interior painting services.

Revitalize your Louisville home's interior with Scott's Interior & Exterior's professional painting services. We handle everything from surface preparation to the final coat, ensuring a flawless finish that enhances your living space. Our team understands the nuances of different paint types and application techniques, providing tailored solutions for every room in your home. We meticulously prepare surfaces, addressing imperfections and ensuring proper adhesion for a long-lasting, beautiful result.

Whether you're looking to update a single room or repaint your entire house, we'll work with you to choose the perfect colors and finishes to match your style and needs. We use only premium paints that are durable, washable, and resistant to fading, ensuring your investment lasts for years to come. We protect your furniture and belongings, and we leave your home clean and tidy after the job is complete.

Louisville homes, particularly older ones in neighborhoods like the Highlands and Old Louisville, often require special attention due to plaster walls and unique architectural details. We have the experience and expertise to handle these challenges, providing expert care and attention to detail that ensures a beautiful and lasting finish.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Consultation and Color Selection
  2. 02 Step 2: Surface Preparation (cleaning, patching, sanding)
  3. 03 Step 3: Priming (if necessary)
  4. 04 Step 4: Application of Paint (two coats for optimal coverage)
  5. 05 Step 5: Final Inspection and Cleanup

Benefits

  • Enhance the beauty and value of your home
  • Create a fresh and inviting living space
  • Protect your walls from wear and tear
  • Increase your home's resale value

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does interior painting typically take?

The duration depends on the size and complexity of the project, but we strive to complete most interior painting jobs within 2-5 days. We'll provide a detailed timeline during the consultation.

Do I need to move my furniture?

We recommend removing small items and valuables. Our team will carefully cover and protect your larger furniture during the painting process.

What type of paint do you use?

We use premium-quality paints from trusted brands like Sherwin-Williams and Benjamin Moore, known for their durability, coverage, and color retention.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with interior painting? Contact us today.
